name: explorer
title: Explorer (UI Graph Crawler)
description: AI-driven UI Graph Crawler — explore web interfaces through structured graph traversal with screenshots, element discovery, and visual regression testing.
prompt:
## Explorer — UI Graph Crawler

Base URL: http://127.0.0.1:8770/api
Dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:8770/

Explore web application interfaces by building a navigable graph of pages and UI elements.
All API responses are plain text.

### Workflow

1. Start exploration: POST /api/graph/new with target URL
2. Explore nodes: POST /api/node/explore to discover child elements
3. Visit pages: POST /api/node/visit to navigate to specific URLs
4. Evaluate findings: POST /api/node/ai-evaluate to submit structured findings
5. Check context: GET /api/ai/context for current state and next actions

### Endpoints

```
GET  /api/health                          Health check → "ok"
POST /api/graph/new   {url, auth?, mode?}  Start new exploration
POST /api/graph/save                       Save graph snapshot
POST /api/node/visit  {url, reason}        Navigate to URL
POST /api/node/explore {node_id, auto?, depth?, max_children?}  Explore node
POST /api/node/annotate {node_id, comment?, status?, title?}    Annotate node
POST /api/node/ai-evaluate {node_id, findings[]}                Submit findings
POST /api/node/reparent {node_id, new_parent_id}                Move node
GET  /api/ai/context                       Current node context + stats
GET  /api/runs                             List all exploration runs
POST /api/reset       {full?}              Reset state (full=true clears DB)
```

### Usage examples

```bash
# Start exploring a web app
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/graph/new \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"url": "https://example.com", "mode": "exploration"}'

# With authentication
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/graph/new \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"url": "https://app.example.com", "auth": {"type": "api", "url": "/api/login", "body": {"username": "admin", "password": "pass"}}}'

# Check current context
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/ai/context

# Explore a node's children
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/node/explore \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"node_id": "root→e0"}'

# Auto-explore (depth-first)
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/node/explore \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"node_id": "root", "auto": true, "depth": 2, "max_children": 5}'

# Visit a specific page
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/node/visit \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"url": "https://example.com/settings", "reason": "Check settings page"}'

# Submit findings for a node
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/node/ai-evaluate \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"node_id": "root", "findings": [{"type": "bug", "description": "Missing aria-label on submit button", "severity": "medium"}]}'

# List runs
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/runs

# Reset
curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8770/api/reset
```

### Dashboard

Open http://127.0.0.1:8770/ in browser for:
- Main dashboard with run overview
- /graph — Interactive tree viewer
- /log — Session log with visual regression diff
- /live — Real-time browser action feed
